resource_role: Population variant frequency and constraint metadata

evidence_boundary.can_support: Population-frequency or constraint-resource provenance for specified variants/genes.
evidence_boundary.cannot_support: Pathogenicity, diagnosis, treatment, or clinical actionability from frequency alone.
evidence_boundary.privacy_or_access: Public metadata request only. Do not submit private manuscript text, patient data, PHI, or unpublished data.
evidence_boundary.handoff: Use this packet as Reef resource evidence for Iceberg, Anchor, or Compass. Do not treat it as primary experimental validation.
